<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band06_chunk003.pdf#page=1 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band06 p100 -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->


[[File:Band06_chunk003_p001_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p001_img002.jpg|thumb|S<sub>18</sub> Bekehrung des hl. Paulus S<sub>22</sub> Hll. Elisabeth und Apollonia]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p001_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p001_img004.jpg|thumb|S<sub>3</sub> Hll. Wolfgang und Georg S<sub>2</sub> Hll. Leonhard und Aegidin]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p001_img005.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p001_img006.jpg|thumb|DETERMINED DINE LHOT MULLIST TO CARTER LES OF LIVE]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p001_img007.jpg|thumb|Seitenschiffe S<sub>1-22</sub> Patrone der Seitenaltäre und musizierende Putton]]



----
IOC



----
IOI
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band06 p101 -->
